reason: Both correctly land on fix-not-kill, cite the ~2.2:1 ratio as thin-but-workable, note the ~6-month payback, and give concrete tactical fixes with a reasonable kill trigger. A covers branded-vs-generic split, landing page/offer-match, and a sound bonus churn insight. B names SEO/content as the compounding-return alternative and adds a point about optimizing on closed-won revenue. Omissions are complementary and roughly offsetting.
